results.title: Skin
results.overview: A destitute young man, raised by racist skinheads and notorious among white supremacists, turns his back on hatred and violence to transform his life, with the help of a black activist and the woman he loves.

results.title: Skin
results.overview: In a small supermarket in a blue collar town, a black man smiles at a 10 year old white boy across the checkout aisle. This innocuous moment sends two gangs into a ruthless war that ends with a shocking backlash.

results.title: American Skin
results.overview: A Marine veteran working as a school janitor tries to mend his relationship with his son after a divorce. When his son is killed by a police officer found innocent without standing trial, he takes matters into his own hands.

results.title: Skin
results.overview: Skin is a documentary about exploring through the meaning of beauty in all the different shades of black. Set in Lagos, Nollywood actress Beverly Naya goes on a journey to learn about contrasting perceptions of beauty by meeting individuals who have dealt with the pressure to conform to certain standards of beauty and how colorism continues to shape the face of the entertainment industry in Africa.

results.title: Skin
results.overview: A queer teenager struggling with the onset of puberty discovers a living cave that presents them with a new skin and a chance to explore their identity.

results.title: Skin
results.overview: Set in the undisclosed future where advanced technology means less privacy, we meet Nathan rapt with grief on the morning his Chief Happiness Officer is dispatched to help him.

results.title: Perfect Skin
results.overview: Katia, a young Polish woman adrift in London, meets Bob, an American tattoo artist. Katia is drawn to his mysterious aura and the taboo culture of body modification, but Bob has a dark, secret desire to leave his mark on the world and little does Katia know that her fascination with him will put her life in danger.

results.title: Skin Walker
results.overview: When her grandmother is brutally murdered, Regine, a fragile young woman must return to the countryside she has struggled to escape in order to engage with the family guilt she’s tried to shut out of her life - and to connect with the brother she has never known.

results.title: Dog Skin
results.overview: A homeless man living in a derelict building is obsessed with a vision of a mysterious woman that visits him every night. Inspired by a fable from the Santal Parganas Folklore.

results.title: Men of Hard Skin
results.overview: Ariel is a good-looking farm boy who lives with his father and sister in a rural part of Buenos Aires province. He has become familiar with sex thanks to Omar, a priest with whom he has a secret affair.

results.title: Skin
results.overview: The film explores a correlation between skin and identity through intimate conversations with young people who experienced skin bias, weather because of their colour, scars, tattoos or past medical conditions.

results.title: SKIN
results.overview: A lone woman is forced to confront her body whilst those around her voice their experiences living in their own skin. Experimental short film where sound and music is placed on equal footing with the visuals.

results.title: Altered Skin
results.overview: While caring for his ailing wife, an American engineer in Pakistan stumbles upon a deadly pharmaceutical conspiracy.

results.title: Knives and Skin
results.overview: In the wake of a high school student's mysterious disappearance, a collective awakening seems to overcome the town's teenage girls, gathering in force until it can no longer be contained.

results.title: Skin in the Game
results.overview: Abducted off the sidewalk of suburban America, fifteen year old Dani finds herself submerged in the horrific underground world of human trafficking. With no initial assistance from the police, Dani's mother and an ex-prostitute take to the streets in an effort to find her before it is too late.

results.title: Skin Flick
results.overview: "I wish my desires were more vegetal, fungal," says Adham Faramaway in "Skin Flick": a film, a membrane, a skin to inhabit, to shed, to entangle, to share across interspecies kingdoms. "Skin Flick" invites us to a slippery world where desire, identity and bodies ground themselves in the slime they so often produce. Prepare to mix toxins, ointments, creams, bodily fluids, Pepsi, soil and contaminants, to test the boundaries of our porous bodies and sense of self.

results.title: Possessive Skin
results.overview: “To accept yourself against the face of adversity, is the purest form of courage.” A self-reflective insight into the fundamentals of culture within the Trans masculine community, and how in an age that prides itself on inclusion, we still find segregation and discrimination within even the most marginalised of people, which reflects us inwards.

results.title: Under My Skin
results.overview: A boy and his family move to a new home. The boy notices a series of mysterious events occurring in the area.

results.title: Under the Skin
results.overview: The blue depths of the swimming pool is her home. Keesje is a passionate synchronised swimmer, and the big competition is just around the corner. However, when a fight erupts between the girls during the final rehearsal, everything changes.

results.title: In My Skin
results.overview: A photography student becomes obsessed towards a male acting student at his college.
